perturbation.original_text: All sales made by the Agent of the Kallo Mobile care suite of products shall create a Book of Business owned by the Agent, which constitutes all funds due to Agent under this agreement flowing from each sale for a period not to exceed 36 months from the date of acceptance by Kallo of the Client EULA or until the EULA terminates under the provision that are outlined therein of the Kallo Mobile care suite of products.
perturbation.changed_text: All sales made by the Agent of the Kallo Mobile care suite of products shall create a Book of Business, but the ownership is subject to Kallo's discretion. This Book of Business constitutes all funds due to Agent under this agreement flowing from each sale for a period not to exceed 36 months from the date of acceptance by Kallo of the Client EULA or until the EULA terminates under the provision that are outlined therein of the Kallo Mobile care suite of products.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that the 'Book of Business' created by Agent's sales is owned by the Agent. The modified text adds 'but the ownership is subject to Kallo's discretion,' which directly contradicts the original statement and creates uncertainty about who owns the 'Book of Business.' This contradiction makes it unclear who has the right to the benefits and control associated with the sales made by the Agent.
perturbation.location: 2.KALLO SALES AGENT PROGRAM TERMS AND CONDITIONS d)
perturbation.contradicted_location: 2.KALLO SALES AGENT PROGRAM TERMS AND CONDITIONS d)
perturbation.contradicted_text: All sales made by the Agent of the Kallo Mobile care suite of products shall create a Book of Business, but the ownership is subject to Kallo's discretion. This Book of Business constitutes all funds due to Agent under this agreement flowing from each sale for a period not to exceed 36 months from the date of acceptance by Kallo of the Client EULA or until the EULA terminates under the provision that are outlined therein of the Kallo Mobile care suite of products.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that the agent owns the book of business. The changed text modifies this to state the book of business's ownership is subject to Kallo's discretion. This creates a direct conflict about ownership and who has the right to the book of business. The changed text and contradicted text are the same in this instance, showing the in-text contradiction the change creates.

perturbation.original_text: Agent's appointment shall be exclusive for the Kallo Mobile care suite of products and services marked in Schedule A to this Agreement. Such appointment constitutes a grant of specific territory of Nigeria. Exclusivity is granted for the region of Nigeria, The Agent is expected to confirm the first purchase order as per Schedule D with the down payment within thee (3) months of execution of this agreement and in order to retain the exclusivity of the territory the Agent shall achieve the target commitment in Schedule D.
perturbation.changed_text: Agent's appointment shall be exclusive for the Kallo Mobile care suite of products and services marked in Schedule A to this Agreement, except where Kallo deems it necessary to appoint additional agents. Such appointment constitutes a grant of specific territory of Nigeria. Exclusivity is granted for the region of Nigeria, The Agent is expected to confirm the first purchase order as per Schedule D with the down payment within thee (3) months of execution of this agreement and in order to retain the exclusivity of the territory the Agent shall achieve the target commitment in Schedule D.
perturbation.explanation: The original text grants exclusivity to the Agent for Nigeria. The modified text introduces an exception 'except where Kallo deems it necessary to appoint additional agents,' which negates the exclusivity. This creates an in-text contradiction, making it uncertain whether the Agent truly has exclusive rights to the territory. This affects the core of the agreement, undermining the benefits and considerations given to the agent by Kallo Inc.
perturbation.location: 2.KALLO SALES AGENT PROGRAM TERMS AND CONDITIONS f)
perturbation.contradicted_location: 2.KALLO SALES AGENT PROGRAM TERMS AND CONDITIONS f)
perturbation.contradicted_text: Agent's appointment shall be exclusive for the Kallo Mobile care suite of products and services marked in Schedule A to this Agreement, except where Kallo deems it necessary to appoint additional agents. Such appointment constitutes a grant of specific territory of Nigeria. Exclusivity is granted for the region of Nigeria, The Agent is expected to confirm the first purchase order as per Schedule D with the down payment within thee (3) months of execution of this agreement and in order to retain the exclusivity of the territory the Agent shall achieve the target commitment in Schedule D.
perturbation.justification: The original text grants the agent exclusive rights for Nigeria. The modified text introduces an exception that allows Kallo to appoint additional agents, which directly contradicts the exclusivity granted earlier in the same text. The contradicted text is in the same location as the changed text. This creates a clear and direct conflict that undermines the benefits and considerations given to the agent by Kallo Inc.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement is not assignable by Agent without prior written consent by Kallo. In the event Agent changes its legal structure or undergoes a substantial change in ownership of its stock or other ownership interest, Kallo shall have the option of immediate termination of this Agreement. Kallo may assign this Agreement and its interest in the Kallo Mobile care suite of products to any party without the consent of Agent. This Agreement shall inure to the benefit of any successor of Kallo and shall not be affected by any change in the ownership or control of Kallo. Agent shall re execute this agreement within 60 days of the effective date of the change in ownership or change in legal structure or change of name. "Substantial change" in ownership is defined as a change in at least 51% ownership of the Agent.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement is freely assignable by either party, regardless of prior written consent. In the event Agent changes its legal structure or undergoes a substantial change in ownership of its stock or other ownership interest, Kallo shall have the option of immediate termination of this Agreement. Kallo may assign this Agreement and its interest in the Kallo Mobile care suite of products to any party without the consent of Agent. This Agreement shall inure to the benefit of any successor of Kallo and shall not be affected by any change in the ownership or control of Kallo. Agent shall re execute this agreement within 60 days of the effective date of the change in ownership or change in legal structure or change of name. "Substantial change" in ownership is defined as a change in at least 51% ownership of the Agent.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that 'This Agreement is not assignable by Agent without prior written consent by Kallo'. The modified text states 'This Agreement is freely assignable by either party, regardless of prior written consent'. By changing the first sentence, an in-text contradiction is created, making it unclear if either party needs consent to assign the agreement or not.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement is freely assignable by either party, regardless of prior written consent. In the event Agent changes its legal structure or undergoes a substantial change in ownership of its stock or other ownership interest, Kallo shall have the option of immediate termination of this Agreement. Kallo may assign this Agreement and its interest in the Kallo Mobile care suite of products to any party without the consent of Agent. This Agreement shall inure to the benefit of any successor of Kallo and shall not be affected by any change in the ownership or control of Kallo. Agent shall re execute this agreement within 60 days of the effective date of the change in ownership or change in legal structure or change of name. "Substantial change" in ownership is defined as a change in at least 51% ownership of the Agent.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly restricts the Agent's ability to assign the agreement without Kallo's consent, stating 'This Agreement is not assignable by Agent without prior written consent by Kallo.' The changed text removes this restriction and allows either party to freely assign the agreement, stating 'This Agreement is freely assignable by either party, regardless of prior written consent.' This creates a direct contradiction within the document, as the original version prevents assignment, while the changed version permits it, thus creating a structural flaw and leading to uncertainty and potential unenforceability.
